_comment: External NPC generator tables for DnDAcademy.
Drop this file at generator/npc-tables.json and it will be fetched on startup.
_merge: true  (default) — arrays are appended to the built-in tables.
_merge: false           — arrays replace the built-in tables entirely.
Schema mirrors the T object in js/generator.js. Supported top-level keys:
races         [ { v: string, nameKey: string, w: number } ]
genders       [ { v: string, pronouns: [he,him,his], w: number } ]
To add a new occupation category, add a new key under occupations.
To replace built-in human names entirely, set _merge: false.

names._comment: Names sourced from user-curated names.json + npc_rename.py corpus.

_occupations_comment: Add new categories here. Existing categories are extended, not replaced.
_traits_comment: Additional personality traits added to the built-in pool.
traits: Always knows the most recent local news before anyone else does.
Refers to their most recent employer in present tense despite the relationship clearly being over.
Has a completely different personality when they drink — better, somehow.
Volunteers for jobs they aren't qualified for and somehow usually manages.
Keeps a running list of the places they've slept and ranks them.
Has a specific, loud opinion about correct fire-starting technique.
Genuinely cannot tell when someone is being sarcastic.
Collects newspaper clippings, broadsheets, or posters from wherever they've been.
Refuses to use any tool that isn't theirs. Will borrow but won't stop mentioning it.
Gives everyone a nickname within ten minutes. Stops using their actual name.
Maintains exactly three ongoing feuds at any given time.
Always acts like they've been here before, even when they haven't.
Insists on inspecting everything they're about to sit on before sitting.
Incredibly fast eater. Treats meals like problems to be solved.
_hooks_comment: Additional adventure hooks added to the built-in pool.
hooks: Recently acquired a map that doesn't match any geography they can identify.
Has been receiving messages they didn't ask for, from someone who seems to know them well.
Needs to fence something quickly — the original owner is looking for it.
Has access to a restricted location and is willing to negotiate.
Carrying a debt that has recently become a physical threat.
Witnessed something they weren't supposed to and hasn't reported it to anyone.
Looking to hire someone for a job they're too well-known to do themselves.
Has recently been warned, very specifically, to stay out of something they were curious about.
_secrets_comment: Additional DM secrets added to the built-in pool.
secrets: Was hired to get close to someone in the party's orbit. Hasn't completed the job yet.
Knows the location of a significant cache of wealth that isn't theirs to claim.
Has been replaced once already — the original person with this name is no longer around.
Owes their position to something they'd never want known publicly.
Carries evidence of a crime that would end someone powerful. Hasn't decided what to do with it.
Is significantly more dangerous than they appear. Has had extensive training they don't mention.
